사도행전 8:1.content: Saul was consenting to his death. A great persecution arose against the assembly which was in Jerusalem in that day. They were all scattered abroad throughout the regions of Judea and Samaria, except for the apostles.

사도행전 8:2.content: Devout men buried Stephen and lamented greatly over him.

사도행전 8:3.content: But Saul ravaged the assembly, entering into every house and dragged both men and women off to prison.

사도행전 8:4.content: Therefore those who were scattered abroad went around preaching the word.

사도행전 8:5.content: Philip went down to the city of Samaria, and proclaimed to them the Christ.

사도행전 8:6.content: The multitudes listened with one accord to the things that were spoken by Philip when they heard and saw the signs which he did.

사도행전 8:7.content: For unclean spirits came out of many of those who had them. They came out, crying with a loud voice. Many who had been paralyzed and lame were healed.

사도행전 8:8.content: There was great joy in that city.

사도행전 8:9.content: But there was a certain man, Simon by name, who used to practice sorcery in the city and amazed the people of Samaria, making himself out to be some great one,

사도행전 8:10.content: to whom they all listened, from the least to the greatest, saying, “This man is that great power of God.”

사도행전 8:11.content: They listened to him, because for a long time he had amazed them with his sorceries.

사도행전 8:12.content: But when they believed Philip preaching good news concerning God’s Kingdom and the name of Jesus Christ, they were baptized, both men and women.

사도행전 8:13.content: Simon himself also believed. Being baptized, he continued with Philip. Seeing signs and great miracles occurring, he was amazed.

사도행전 8:14.content: Now when the apostles who were at Jerusalem heard that Samaria had received the word of God, they sent Peter and John to them,

사도행전 8:15.content: who, when they had come down, prayed for them, that they might receive the Holy Spirit;

사도행전 8:16.content: for as yet he had fallen on none of them. They had only been baptized in the name of Christ Jesus.

사도행전 8:17.content: Then they laid their hands on them, and they received the Holy Spirit.

사도행전 8:18.content: Now when Simon saw that the Holy Spirit was given through the laying on of the apostles’ hands, he offered them money,

사도행전 8:19.content: saying, “Give me also this power, that whomever I lay my hands on may receive the Holy Spirit.”

사도행전 8:20.content: But Peter said to him, “May your silver perish with you, because you thought you could obtain the gift of God with money!

사도행전 8:21.content: You have neither part nor lot in this matter, for your heart isn’t right before God.

사도행전 8:22.content: Repent therefore of this, your wickedness, and ask God if perhaps the thought of your heart may be forgiven you.

사도행전 8:23.content: For I see that you are in the poison of bitterness and in the bondage of iniquity.”

사도행전 8:24.content: Simon answered, “Pray for me to the Lord, that none of the things which you have spoken happen to me.”

사도행전 8:25.content: They therefore, when they had testified and spoken the word of the Lord, returned to Jerusalem, and preached the Good News to many villages of the Samaritans.

사도행전 8:26.content: But an angel of the Lord spoke to Philip, saying, “Arise, and go toward the south to the way that goes down from Jerusalem to Gaza. This is a desert.”

사도행전 8:27.content: He arose and went; and behold, there was a man of Ethiopia, a eunuch of great authority under Candace, queen of the Ethiopians, who was over all her treasure, who had come to Jerusalem to worship.

사도행전 8:28.content: He was returning and sitting in his chariot, and was reading the prophet Isaiah.

사도행전 8:29.content: The Spirit said to Philip, “Go near, and join yourself to this chariot.”

사도행전 8:30.content: Philip ran to him, and heard him reading Isaiah the prophet, and said, “Do you understand what you are reading?”

사도행전 8:31.content: He said, “How can I, unless someone explains it to me?” He begged Philip to come up and sit with him.

사도행전 8:32.content: Now the passage of the Scripture which he was reading was this, “He was led as a sheep to the slaughter. As a lamb before his shearer is silent, so he doesn’t open his mouth.

사도행전 8:33.content: In his humiliation, his judgment was taken away. Who will declare His generation? For his life is taken from the earth.”

사도행전 8:34.content: The eunuch answered Philip, “Who is the prophet talking about? About himself, or about someone else?”

사도행전 8:35.content: Philip opened his mouth, and beginning from this Scripture, preached to him about Jesus.

사도행전 8:36.content: As they went on the way, they came to some water, and the eunuch said, “Behold, here is water. What is keeping me from being baptized?”

사도행전 8:38.content: He commanded the chariot to stand still, and they both went down into the water, both Philip and the eunuch, and he baptized him.

사도행전 8:39.content: When they came up out of the water, the Spirit of the Lord caught Philip away, and the eunuch didn’t see him any more, for he went on his way rejoicing.

사도행전 8:40.content: But Philip was found at Azotus. Passing through, he preached the Good News to all the cities, until he came to Caesarea.
